title: Towers of Chambers
description: Turn the trial chambers in to a big tower. Let's Trial!
body:
![tower of chamber](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e01897e1b30ae4897dead655e0a4c48babe0c8d.png)

**Tower of Chambers is an intense Minecraft mod that challenges players to ascend a tower filled with Trial Chambers. Each floor of the tower contains a unique chamber with deadly trials, and hostile mobs, testing your combat prowess, wit, and endurance. with each chamber offering greater rewards for those brave enough to face its trials. Conquer the Tower of Chambers and claim your place as a master adventurer!**

![neoforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed7fb42f298cbd8d4f1f92b606403e23e07f636e.webp)
Fabric 1.21.1 soon!


![tower of chamber](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e01897e1b30ae4897dead655e0a4c48babe0c8d.png)
![#minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3376aa997efa39c37840117a9358e6b83cbf3d88.webp)



# Features:
**Multi-Level Tower: The tower consists of multiple levels, each containing a Trial Chamber with different themes, mobs, and challenges. No two floors are the same, keeping the gameplay exciting and unpredictable.** 

![trial spawner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47956ac7a5b6eecf6685b0801ee52d1be3aa1144.webp) 

Defended by trial spawners!

![mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e54f4656cd70fe6897ce641886e570c51c1e0959.webp)
**Clear the tower and obtain the mace!**

![breeze](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e36257e7977b43d2d07223925b8ce400dc87bb48.webp)
**Fight the new minecraft mobs in the tower: bogged, breeze, and more!**


![bogged](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7510fb9664bad968e090a721ee142a6c000175d.webp)



![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/343a4cdc7be7fa26dfd02e5d47dfbffa99016f2f.png)

 **This mod is created with: intellij**
